thinking: I walk down a narrow cafe/kitchen area toward a yellow rectangular table on the left, where a seated female customer is visible beside several wooden chairs; cabinets, a sink, cookware, and a refrigerator come into view along the back wall as I get closer. The customer remains seated at the far side of the table, initially looking down with one hand near the tabletop, then briefly raises a hand to her head and looks toward me as I approach. I continue moving to the near edge of the table, angling my view downward toward her place setting area. At the end, my hand extends a small flat white item over the table toward the customer, as if presenting a receipt, menu, or bill.
caption: CLERK: Intent to serve or complete the table interaction; I approached the seated customer and held out a small white item across the table for her. CUSTOMER: Intent to receive service or respond to the clerk; she stayed seated, looked up from the table, touched her head briefly, and oriented her attention toward me as I arrived.
